old_value: {"id":"da-hw2","title":"PDF reporting engine: backend module with weasyprint + matplotlib","description":"Create backend reporting system for darkdisco. New src/darkdisco/reporting/ module with PDF generation engine. Jinja2 HTML templates for report layout (executive summary, findings detail, source activity, institution exposure, classification breakdown, timeline). weasyprint for HTML-\u003ePDF, matplotlib for charts (severity pie, trend line, bar charts). New Pydantic schemas for report request (date range, content toggles, chart inclusion). API endpoints: POST /api/reports/generate (returns PDF), GET /api/reports/preview (returns HTML). Add deps to requirements.txt. Sections individually toggleable. Jinja2 HTML templates for report layout (executive summary, findings detail, source activity, institution exposure, classification breakdown, timeline). weasyprint for HTML->PDF, matplotlib for charts (severity pie, trend line, bar charts). New Pydantic schemas for report request (date range, content toggles, chart inclusion). API endpoints: POST /api/reports/generate (returns PDF), GET /api/reports/preview (returns HTML). Add deps to requirements.txt. Sections individually toggleable. Charts embedded as base64 PNG."}
